title: Phantom RO loadout
description: Personal setup backup.This modpack is a personal setup created for the sole purpose of quickly restoring a familiar Minecraft environment across different computers. It is not designed as a showcase, recommendation, or competitive release, but rather as a
body:
This modpack is a personal setup created for the sole purpose of quickly restoring a familiar Minecraft environment across different computers. It is not designed as a showcase, recommendation, or competitive release, but rather as a practical backup of an already configured instance. The pack is based on the Remarkably Optimized performance stack and includes additional client-side modifications chosen for stability, usability, and low resource usage.

All configurations, keybinds, and client preferences are preserved to reduce repeated setup time when switching devices or reinstalling the game. The focus of this modpack is consistency rather than experimentation. No custom gameplay mechanics, progression changes, or content expansions are included. Instead, the goal is to maintain a lightweight and predictable experience that closely matches the original configured environment.

This project is uploaded publicly only for accessibility and convenience, allowing installation in a few steps through compatible launchers. It is not intended to be advertised, compared, or evaluated against other modpacks. Performance and behavior may vary depending on hardware, operating system, and Minecraft version, and no guarantees are made regarding compatibility outside the tested setup.

Credits and licenses remain with the respective mod authors. This modpack does not redistribute mods directly and functions only as a configuration and dependency list. Users are advised not to treat this pack as a general recommendation and to use it only if they understand its limited and personal scope.
